posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

pages.text: About MEHi, my name is Tianao Yang(杨天傲). I’m a senior year of undergraduate student in the Department of Computer Science and Technology, Tsinghua University. I’ll be a Ph.D. student in 2024 in Tsinghua Storage Research Group, advised by Prof. Youyou Lu and Prof. Jiwu Shu. My research interests include storage system for deep learning, programmable network devices and human computer interaction.我叫杨天傲，是一名清华大学计算机科学与技术系的大四学生，长期居住在北京。如无意外，我会在2024年秋季学期开始在清华直博，继续攻读本专业的博士学位。我目前在清华大学存储研究组进行科研工作，我的导师是舒继武教授和陆游游教授。我的研究兴趣包括为机器学习开发高效系统；利用新的硬件设备（如可编程链路层网络设备）加速模型训练；以及终端用户编程
Feel Free to Contact Me via WeChat…
